news_items.headline: ggml-org/llama.cpp released b8943
news_items.summary:
New release b8943 of ggml-org/llama.cpp. <details open>

common: fix missing exports in llama-common (#22340)

* common: refactor common/debug to move abort_on_nan into base_callback_data

Passing bool abort_on_nan as template parameter for common_debug_cb_eval is unnecessary and creates an issue with LTO.
It should just be a member of the base_callback_data instead.

* cont : cleanup

* common : use pimpl in debug.h to reduce header dep

news_items.headline: ggml-org/llama.cpp released b8941
news_items.summary:
New release b8941 of ggml-org/llama.cpp. <details open>

add performance-portable tuning for register-tile and subgroup matmul (#22241)

</details>

news_items.headline: ggml-org/llama.cpp released b8940
news_items.summary:
New release b8940 of ggml-org/llama.cpp. <details open>

Fix recurrent state serialization for partial reads and writes (#22362)

The previous code worked only for full tensor reads and writes and was hitting `GGML_ASSERT(size == ggml_nbytes(tensor)); ` assert when tested with llama-server.

</details>

**macOS/iOS:**
- [macOS Apple Silicon (arm64)](https://github.com/ggml-org/llama.cpp/releases/download/b8940/llama-b8940-bin-macos-arm64

news_items.headline: ollama/ollama released v0.21.3
news_items.summary:
New release v0.21.3-rc0 of ollama/ollama. ## What's Changed
* api: accept "max" as a think value by @ParthSareen in https://github.com/ollama/ollama/pull/15787
* openai: map responses reasoning effort to think by @ParthSareen in https://github.com/ollama/ollama/pull/15789


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ollama/ollama/compare/v0.21.2...v0.21.3-rc0

news_items.headline: open-webui/open-webui released v0.9.2
news_items.summary:
New release v0.9.2 of open-webui/open-webui. 
### Added

- 🧠 **PaddleOCR-vl document extraction.** Administrators can now use PaddleOCR-vl as a content extraction engine for document processing, with configurable API URL and token settings in document retrieval configuration. [#23945](https://github.com/open-webui/open-webui/pull/23945)
- 🔥 **Firecrawl v2 API.** Firecrawl web loading now uses the v2 API directly with proper retry logic, expo

news_items.headline: crewAIInc/crewAI released 1.14.3
news_items.summary:
New release 1.14.3 of crewAIInc/crewAI. ## What's Changed

### Features
- Add lifecycle events for checkpoint operations
- Add support for e2b
- Fall back to DefaultAzureCredential when no API key is provided in Azure integration
- Add Bedrock V4 support
- Add Daytona sandbox tools for enhanced functionality
- Add checkpoint and fork support to standalone agents

### Bug Fixes
- Fix execution_id to be separate from state.id
- Resolve re
